title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim founded Paraform, a hiring platform that has paid over $50 million to human recruiters while competitors automate hiring. The company 10x'd revenue in 2025 by positioning human recruiter expertise as a competitive moat rather than attempting to replace them with AI, serving customers like Palantir and Rippling.
